scripts.check:pine-boundary: rg -n "request\.security\(|request\.security_lower_tf\(|request\.seed\(|\bhttp\b|\bfetch\b|strategy\(|strategy\.entry|strategy\.order|strategy\.exit|strategy\.close|BUY NOW|SELL NOW|ENTER LONG|ENTER SHORT|/smi/|/debug/" tradingview/pine --glob '*.pine' && exit 1 || exit 0
